{
  "analysis": "Clean prompt again. Let me train a model with better parameters. The first model (dim=50, bucket=200000, wordNgrams=2, epoch=10) gave 0.6015 accuracy (79MB). I need >0.62. I'll increase dim to 64, wordNgrams=3, epoch=25, lr=0.05, bucket=200000.",
  "plan": "Train new model with improved parameters.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import fasttext

model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/tmp/train.txt',
    lr=0.05,
    dim=64,
    ws=5,
    epoch=25,
    minCount=5,
    wordNgrams=3,
    bucket=200000,
    verbose=2
)

model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
print('Model saved')
import os
size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / 1024 / 1024
print(f'Model size: {size_mb:.2f} MB')

result = model.test('/tmp/test.txt')
print(f'Test samples: {result[0]}, P@1: {result[1]:.4f}, R@1: {result[2]:.4f}')
"
",
      "duration": 180.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
